---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - text: Brightspace
      href: https://bright.uvic.ca
    - text: Course Site
      href: https://edtechuvic.ca/edci337


---

This site is a work-in-progress mirror of our [main course site](https://edtechuvic.ca/edci337), which is going through some things lately. I will be working to provide as much of the content as possible here.
